---
title: "Fasting and Stress Eating"
author: "Lisa Menghini"
date: "2026-04"
format: pptx
---

## Stress Manipulation Check

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analysis/figures/figure_stress_check.png)

## Manipulation Checks

![](file:///Users/lisamenghini/Documents/Uni/Masterarbeit/Data/MA_Analy
